title: Anthropic Just Dropped Fable 5 And It’s Terrifying
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, described as a Mythos-class AI model with strong capabilities in software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, scientific research, and cybersecurity. Anthropic implemented safety systems that limit its full capabilities in high-risk areas including cybersecurity, biology, chemistry, and model distillation.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, presented as a Mythos-class model with capabilities spanning software engineering, knowledge work, vision, analytics, scientific research, and cybersecurity. It matters because Anthropic paired the release with safety systems that cap the model's full capabilities in high-risk domains. The concrete takeaways: the restricted areas include cybersecurity, biology, chemistry, and model distillation.
